promoted_facts.fact: Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024 as asset acquisition for ~$85M, 15-year amortization
HFH is disregarded entity for US federal income tax; no US federal tax provision at HFH level
All HFH assets pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (2025-2033 maturities)
HFH licenses IP from Hilton affiliate on ROYALTY-FREE basis
Contract acquisition cost amortization reduces royalty fee revenue ($16.1M in 2024)
promoted_facts.source: Exhibit C Note 2, p 123 and Note 4, p 124

promoted_facts.fact: HSM late payment interest rate 18.5%/yr compounded daily
Interim remedies include software disable and reservation diversion prior to termination
Construction start deadline 16 months, complete 36 months from application approval
Eforea spa must open within 12 months of Spa Amendment
11 states with J-1 addenda (CA, HI, IL, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WA)
Exhibit D-1 State Addenda to Franchise Agreement at pp 183-196 (not deep-read; pending)
